name: Aayush Mishra

projects.title: Ryvos

services.title: AI Systems Engineering
services.description: Secure autonomous agents, tool orchestration, and high-performance backend systems.

services.title: Applied Computer Vision
services.description: Production-ready OCR and detection systems optimized for latency and accuracy on GPU infrastructure.

aboutpara: I’m Aayush Mishra, an AI Systems Engineer and MS Advanced Computer Science student at the University of Birmingham. I build secure autonomous products and intelligent developer tools, from Rust-native assistant systems like Ryvos to practical learning platforms like AlgoAce and graphics-heavy engines like MistEngine.

resume.tagline: Founder, AI Systems Engineer, and full-stack product builder.
resume.description: I work across Rust, Python, and modern web stacks to ship secure, scalable AI products with measurable performance impact.

experiences.bullets: Architected Ryvos as a Rust-based autonomous AI assistant (23k+ LOC) with 5-tier tool security, 50+ built-in tools, MCP compatibility, and concurrent task execution.
Improved ANPR accuracy by 20% and reduced per-frame latency by 15% by building and optimizing PyTorch + OpenCV detection/OCR pipelines on GPU-backed infrastructure.
Developed Unity C# gameplay features and reduced code complexity by 25% through cleaner architecture and component refactors.

education.universityPara: MS in Advanced Computer Science with focus on advanced networking, algorithmic complexity, intelligent systems, and scalable architectures.
